ITEM 1B.
UNRESOLVED STAFF COMMENTS
None.
[LOCATION]
The Walmart [LOCATION] and [PERSON]'s Club segments comprise the Company's operations in the [LOCATION] As of [DATE_TIME], unit counts for [LOCATION] and [PERSON]'s Club are summarized by format for each state and territory as follows:
International
The Walmart International segment comprises the Company's operations outside of the [LOCATION] Unit counts as of [DATE_TIME]) for Walmart International are summarized by major category for each geographic market as follows:
(1)
Walmart International unit counts, with the exception of [LOCATION], are as of [DATE_TIME], to correspond with the balance sheet date of the related geographic market. [LOCATION] unit counts are as of [DATE_TIME].
(2)
Other includes stand-alone gas stations.
(3)
Square feet reported in thousands.
(4)
[LOCATION] unit counts primarily reside in [LOCATION], with other locations in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION].
(5)
[LOCATION] unit counts reside in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION].
Owned and Leased Properties
The following table provides further details of our retail units and distribution facilities, including return facilities and dedicated eCommerce fulfillment centers, as of [DATE_TIME]:
(1)
Also includes [LOCATION] and international distribution facilities which are third-party owned and operated.
We own office facilities in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], that serve as our principal office and own and lease office facilities throughout the [LOCATION] and internationally for operations as well as for field and market management. The land on which our stores are located is either owned or leased by the Company. We use independent contractors to construct our buildings. All store leases provide for [DATE_TIME] rentals, some of which escalate during the original lease or provide for additional rent based on sales volume. Substantially all of the Company's store and club leases have renewal options, some of which include rent escalation clauses.
For further information on our distribution centers, see the caption "Distribution" provided for each of our segments under "[DATE_TIME]. Business."
ITEM 3.
